name: printer-corner-fit
description: Two-full-sides + stubs test for ptouch-cradle's printer pocket — full back wall + full right long wall + left/front stubs form three inside corners (back-left, back-right, front-right). Verifies pocket X (80mm) and Y (154mm) interior dimensions plus 1mm/side XY clearance against the actual PT-P750W corners. Front-left corner is the only one not present.
